title: Thinking about a E90 335i as a daily - what should I watch for?

body:
I just picked up a car in this chassis and I’m trying to get ahead of the common issues. The service history looks decent, but I’d like to know what people usually inspect first once the car is home.

Any advice from people who have owned E90 335i would be appreciated.

title: Project update: my E46 M3 is finally back on the road

body:

title: Which wheels fit the G20 M340i without rubbing?

body:
